name: Short Attack Playbook
description: A pattern triggered by a short-seller report, followed by market shock, company rebuttal, and a long regulatory investigation phase.

phases.name: Report Publication
phases.description: A short-seller publishes a detailed report alleging fraud, inflated valuations, or governance issues. The report is designed for maximum market impact.

phases.name: Market Shock
phases.description: Markets react sharply. Stock price drops significantly. Credit rating agencies may review. Institutional investors reassess positions.

phases.name: Company Rebuttal
phases.description: The targeted company issues a detailed rebuttal. May announce buybacks, provide additional disclosures, or take legal action against the short-seller.

phases.name: Regulatory Investigation & Resolution
phases.description: Regulators investigate both the allegations and trading activity. Resolution can take months to years. Outcome ranges from vindication to enforcement.
